title: Project Management Specialists
description: Analyze and coordinate the schedule, timeline, procurement, staffing, and budget of a product or service on a per project basis. Lead and guide the work of technical staff. May serve as a point of contact for the client or customer.

tasks.text: Assign duties or responsibilities to project personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Communicate with key stakeholders to determine project requirements and objectives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with project personnel to identify and resolve problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create project status presentations for delivery to customers or project personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop or update project plans including information such as objectives, technologies, schedules, funding, and staffing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify project needs such as resources, staff, or finances by reviewing project objectives and schedules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Identify, review, or select vendors or consultants to meet project needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor costs incurred by project staff to identify budget issues.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor project milestones and deliverables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor the performance of project team members to provide performance feedback.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Negotiate with project stakeholders or suppliers to obtain resources or materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, schedule, or coordinate project activities to meet deadlines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and submit budget estimates, progress reports, or cost tracking reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Produce and distribute project documents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Propose, review, or approve modifications to project plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recruit or hire project personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Report project status, such as budget, resources, technical issues, or customer satisfaction, to managers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Request and review project updates to ensure deadlines are met.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Schedule or facilitate project meetings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Submit project deliverables to clients, ensuring adherence to quality standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
